CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent__c)), ISPICKVAL(sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_S_Commission_Term__c, 'Immediate') ), sugati__S_O_Total_Profit__c / sugati__S_O_Total_Gross_Sell_Price_Selling__c, sugati__S_O_Total_Profit__c / Amount )
CustomField.label: Margin (Before Agency Commission)
